headline: Carnival Data Breach Exposes Names, Addresses And Government ID Numbers After Cybercriminals Trick Employee In Social Engineering Attack
summary: A cybersecurity incident at cruise operator Carnival Corp. exposed sensitive personal information after attackers gained access through a compromised employee account in a social engineering attack.
